sections.paragraph:
Original: לעדּן

Transliteration: la‛dân

Phonetic: lah-dawn'

BDB Definition:

Laadan = "put in order"
  1. an Ephraimite ancestor of Joshua, son of Nun
  2. a Levite son of Gershom; also 'Libni'

Origin: from the same as H3935

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
